description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a black, polygonal metal body and two prominent dome-shaped bells on top. The front features a large, round white clock face with black Arabic numerals, black hour and minute hands, and a smaller inset dial for seconds. The clock is supported by two small triangular feet at the base, giving it stability on flat surfaces. The top of the clock has a metal hammer positioned between the bells, used for the alarm function. The back and sides are smooth and unadorned, with the bells and hammer mechanism clearly visible from above. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement on a desk, nightstand, or shelf.
description: A black twin-bell alarm clock with a white face, black numerals, and a classic metal hammer between two dome-shaped bells. The design is sturdy and functional, ideal for tabletop use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white clock face with black numerals, hands, and a small inset dial, framed by the black polygonal body and topped with two bells.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the rounded shape of the bells and the hammer mechanism, with the body appearing as a solid black form.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the smooth, unmarked back of the clock and the symmetrical placement of the bells on top.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the bell and hammer arrangement from the other side.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black Arabic numerals, black hands, and a small inset seconds dial; minimalistic and highly legible.
